cals agric humec rghisThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:15:27 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Director of Research files
New York State College of Agriculture. Director of Research
21-12-1074
8 cubic feet. 8 cubic feet.
[1905]1935-1965. Correspondence, reports, and printed material. Collection of correspondence, reports, research studies and committee reports for the Directors of Research, Department of Agriculture, primarily focused on the late 1950s to late 1960s with a small amount of documents from 1905 and the mid-1930s. Collection material in English 3040679
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Deborah Cooper
Date completed:
January 2018
EAD encoding:
Marcie Farwell, January 2018
Date modified:
RMC Staff, January 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Collection of correspondence, reports, research studies and committee reports for the Directors of Research, Department of Agriculture, primarily focused on the late 1950s to late 1960s with a small amount of documents from 1905 and the mid-1930s.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Departmental Programs and Areas of Interest
Series II. International Programs
Series III. Regional/N.Y State Programs
Series IV. Correspondence
Series V. Progress Reports and Research Reviews
Series VI. Department Committees and Reports
Cite As:
Director of Research files, #21-12-1074. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Cornell University -- : Administration
